meaning: adj.[生理](神经传递的) 单胺能的
examples: Objective To study the effect of rotating magnetic field on metabolism of monoaminergic neurotransmitters in mice.
Objective To study the effect of the magnetic field-treated water on metabolism of monoaminergic nerve transmitters in mice.
CONCLUSION: Curcumin has an antidepressant effect and the effect exerted may be related to monoaminergic neurotransmitter system.
